---
title: "Speaker Dashboard"
format: html
---

## Speaker Dashboard

```{r}
#| context: server
#| echo: false

library(shiny)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)
library(DT)

# CONNECT TO YOUR DATABASE
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname = "Questionk22",
  host = "localhost",
  port = 5432,
  user = "postgres",
  password = "Aa@0011231238"   
)

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Speaker Dashboard"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      actionButton("refresh", "Refresh"),
      actionButton("select", "Select Question"),
      actionButton("reject", "Reject"),
      verbatimTextOutput("stats")
    ),
    mainPanel(
      h4("Pending Questions"),
      DTOutput("questions_table")
    )
  )
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  load_questions <- reactive({
    dbGetQuery(con, "
      SELECT question_id, question_text, country_name, participant_name, organization
      FROM fact_questions fq
      JOIN dim_countries dc ON fq.country_id = dc.country_id
      WHERE status = 'pending'
      ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
    ")
  })
  
  output$questions_table <- renderDT({
    datatable(load_questions(), selection = 'single')
  })
  
  output$stats <- renderPrint({
    pending <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_questions WHERE status = 'pending'")
    cat("Pending:", pending[1,1])
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
